likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cash register.

responses.english: You can pay at the cash register.

likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cash register.

responses.english: You can pay at the cash register.

phrases.text_local: Onde devo pedir os pastéis de nata?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo pih-DEER OOSH puhsh-TEHEESH DIH NAH-tuh?

likely_response.local: Pode pedir diretamente ao balconista na vitrine de doces.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW bahl-koo-NEESH-tuh NUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can order directly from the counter attendant at the pastry display.

responses.english: You can order directly from the counter attendant at the pastry display.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW bahl-koo-NEESH-tuh NUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
responses.local: Pode pedir diretamente ao balconista na vitrine de doces.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay with Multibanco
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terminal Multibanco para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW tih-ruh-mee-NAHL moow-tee-BAHNNG-koo PUH-ruh puh-GAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Multibanco is Portugal's standard payment network. Terminals are typically located at the main cash register in traditional bakeries.

likely_response.local: Pode pagar na caixa registadora, ali perto da vitrine de doces.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh, uh-LEE PEHR-too DUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cash register, near the pastry display case.

responses.english: You can pay at the cash register, near the pastry display case.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh reh-zheesh-tuh-DOH-ruh, uh-LEE PEHR-too DUH veet-REE-nih DIH DOH-sihsh.
responses.local: Pode pagar na caixa registadora, ali perto da vitrine de doces.
